name: twitch-mod-copilot
description: Twitch chat moderation co-pilot with human-in-the-loop oversight

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix apps/server run dev" "npm --prefix apps/dashboard run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix apps/server run build && npm --prefix apps/dashboard run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix apps/server run lint && npm --prefix apps/dashboard run lint
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix apps/server install && npm --prefix apps/dashboard install
